name: ccx
description: Automated dev loops with Codex review gates. Provides /ccx:loop (with --duet mode for Claude↔Codex alternating implementer turns, and --conductor mode that delegates each implement/review turn to a fresh claude -p / codex sub-process for bounded context growth and adaptive per-cycle model-tier selection), /ccx:forever, /ccx:supervisor (parallel Claude↔Codex orchestrator using `claude agents --json` for worker exit detection, with --worker-mode duet|conductor, autonomous chat_ask answering, scope-overlap gating, and a visible/customizable Claude+Codex model ladder — economy/default/strong/max aliases, overridable via STATE_DIR/model-ladder.json, selected per task via --start-tier / BOARD model_start), /ccx:plan (seeds BOARD.md task rows with a model_start alias and optional worker_mode from a prompt or document), and an optional Discord chat bridge (/ccx:chat-setup + --chat).
